intentSynonyms: find nearby starbucks stores by coordinates in starbucks
find starbucks stores near a given latitude/longitude in starbucks
description: Find Starbucks stores near a given latitude/longitude. Returns stores sorted by distance with hours, address, amenities, and mobile ordering availability. Use limit to control result count (default 10).

limit.description: Maximum number of stores to return (default 10, max 50)
